F18 Words in rule 6.11 omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 6(2)(c) (with reg. 22 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(a) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### Service of the application where the respondent gives an address at which the respondent may be served E+W


6.12. Subject to rule 6.13, the respondent may be served with the application at an [ F19 email address in accordance with rule 6.7A or at a postal ] address within the jurisdiction which the respondent has given for the purpose of being served with the proceedings.


Textual Amendments


F19 Words in rule 6.12 inserted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 14 (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


### Service of the application where the respondent does not give an address at which the respondent may be served E+W


6.13. —(1) This rule applies where—


do not apply and the applicant does not wish the application to be served personally under rule 6.7.


[ F20 (2) Subject to paragraphs (3) to (5) the application must be served on the respondent—
